name: AI Integrations in Base44

name: Setting up an AI agent for your app
snippet: You can enable agents for all new apps by default in your account settings in your workspace. When you chat with an AI agent , Base44 uses integration credits.

name: Building a Superagent - Base44 Support Documentation
snippet: Build your own autonomous Superagent in Base44. A Superagent is a persistent AI assistant that connects to your tools, observes events, and takes action across your workspace.

name: Integration with OpenClaw | OpenRouter | OpenRouter
snippet: OpenClaw (formerly Moltbot, formerly Clawdbot) is an open-source AI agent platform that brings conversational AI to multiple messaging channels including Telegram, Discord, Slack, Signal, iMessage, and WhatsApp.
